sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports knee pain rated 6 to 7 on a scale of 1 to 10, and reports pain to palpation at the medial joint line. He reports a feeling of looseness in the knee and reports swelling in the knee. The patient reports a limp. The patient reports pain in the left hand. The patient reports pain in the knee.
medical_concepts: pain to palpation at the medial joint line

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is within normal limits. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurological examination is nonfocal.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are consistent with a possible ligamentous injury and meniscal tear.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor orders an MRI of the knee. The doctor recommends limiting work activities. The doctor recommends slowing down jogging. The doctor will have the nurse schedule an MRI.

medical_concepts: pain to palpation at the medial joint line
